## VitePressPageData interface

Framework-neutral subset of VitePress content data accepted by the adapter.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface VitePressPageData<TFrontmatter extends FrontmatterInput = FrontmatterInput> extends PageDataLike<TFrontmatter>
```
**Extends:** PageDataLike&lt;TFrontmatter&gt;
